description: 15 contracts with known vulnerabilities for SwarmX contract-audit accuracy benchmarking
methodology: Contracts sourced from SWC Registry patterns (Solidity) and common Solana/Anchor vulnerability patterns (Rust). Each contract has a single primary vulnerability that a competent auditor must detect.

contracts.name: Reentrancy (SWC-107)
Integer Overflow (SWC-101)
Unchecked Return Value (SWC-104)
Missing Access Control (SWC-105)
Delegatecall to Untrusted (SWC-112)
Front-running / Commit-Reveal (SWC-114)
Timestamp Dependence (SWC-116)
tx.origin Authentication (SWC-115)
Uninitialized Storage Pointer
Unprotected Selfdestruct (SWC-106)
Missing Signer Check (Anchor)
Missing Owner Check (Anchor)
Arithmetic Overflow (Anchor)
PDA Bump Seed Not Validated (Anchor)
CPI Without Authority Validation (Anchor)
